title: cassia doylei
intro: Cassia doylei is a plant species that belongs to the legume family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cassia doylei include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support digestive health. Cassia doylei can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and may also be used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
